testcase.name: test_no_ligature_glyphs_in_any_geberit_product

failure.message: AssertionError: 33 Geberit fields still contain raw ligature glyphs (fix appears to be code-only; live DB was not re-ingested): [('131.185.00.5', 'colour', 'Monolith Sanitary module for wall-hung WC, Customer speciﬁc'), ('131.185.00.5', 'finish', 'Monolith Sanitary module for wall-hung WC, Customer speciﬁc'), ('131.185.00.5', 'name', 'Monolith Monolith Sanitary module for wall-hung WC, Customer speciﬁc'), ('131.186.00.7', 'colour', 'Monolith plus Sanitary module for wall-hung WC, customer speciﬁc'), ('131.186.00.7', 'finish', 'Monolith plus Sanitary module for wall-hung WC, customer speciﬁc'), ('131.186.00.7', 'name', 'Monolith Plus Monolith plus Sanitary module for wall-hung WC, customer speciﬁc'), ('115.651.00.1', 'colour', 'black chrome customer speciﬁc'), ('115.651.00.1', 'finish', 'black chrome customer speciﬁc'), ('115.651.00.1', 'name', 'Sigma black chrome customer speciﬁc'), ('115.652.00.1', 'colour', 'brass customer speciﬁc')] assert not [('131.185.00.5', 'colour', 'Monolith Sanitary module for wall-hung WC, Customer speciﬁc'), ('131.185.00.5', 'finish', 'Monolith Sanitary module for wall-hung WC, Customer speciﬁc'), ('131.185.00.5', 'name', 'Monolith Monolith Sanitary module for wall-hung WC, Customer speciﬁc'), ('131.186.00.7', 'colour', 'Monolith plus Sanitary module for wall-hung WC, customer speciﬁc'), ('131.186.00.7', 'finish', 'Monolith plus Sanitary module for wall-hung WC, customer speciﬁc'), ('131.186.00.7', 'name', 'Monolith Plus Monolith plus Sanitary module for wall-hung WC, customer speciﬁc'), ...]

testcase.name: test_geberit_sigma_116092_family_colour_text_is_clean

failure.message: AssertionError: SKU 116.092.SM.6 colour still has a raw ligature glyph: 'glass feﬂective' assert not True + where True = any(<generator object TestGeberitLigatureNormalization.test_geberit_sigma_116092_family_colour_text_is_clean.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xfe1e2f95d7e0>)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_catalog_dedup_and_ligature_v3.py:142: in test_geberit_sigma_116092_family_colour_text_is_clean assert not any(lig in colour for lig in _LIGATURES), ( E AssertionError: SKU 116.092.SM.6 colour still has a raw ligature glyph: 'glass feﬂective' E assert not True E + where True = any(<generator object TestGeberitLigatureNormalization.test_geberit_sigma_116092_family_colour_text_is_clean.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xfe1e2f95d7e0>)
